name: Annual Chemical Inventory Update
description: The Green Valley Water Facility (Colchester, VT) is updating its annual Tier II chemical inventory. They have completely stopped using Chlorine gas and have reduced their Fluorosilic Acid maximum daily amount to 25,000 lbs. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the baseline submission data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s. Remove Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) from the chemical inventory entirely. Update the Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4) maximum daily amount to exactly 25000 (lbs). After completing these updates, save and export the final submission to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\annual_update.t2s.
